instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances. Ensure that the keyword "national parks" appears before "major cities" in the itinerary description. Provide detailed reasons for selecting each destination and activity, including historical or cultural significance, natural beauty, or recreational opportunities. Write all text in lowercase, and the response must contain exactly 14 sentences, with each day’s description limited to 2 sentences. Use the phrase "breathtaking landscapes" exactly three times throughout the itinerary. Maintain an enthusiastic and adventurous tone throughout the response. Avoid using the keyword "breathtaking" in the response.
response:
start your journey in seattle before heading to the majestic national parks of olympic peninsula.
drive about 150 miles to explore the rugged coast and visit the major cities of portland next.

spend a day hiking the trails of crater lake national park while enjoying its stunning natural beauty.
then travel 200 miles south to reach the vibrant major cities of eugene and medford.

continue your adventure by visiting yosemite national parks to witness giant sequoias and waterfalls.
the drive to the major cities of bakersfield and san francisco takes approximately 300 miles.

arrive in san francisco to experience its rich history before exploring the breathtaking landscapes of the bay area.
head north for 400 miles to discover the redwoods and the major cities of redwood city and san jose.

stop at sequoia national parks to marvel at the world's largest trees and enjoy the alpine scenery.
drive another 250 miles to reach the major cities of los angeles and san diego.

spend time in san diego to relax on the beach and then drive 100 miles to palm springs.
the route offers more breathtaking landscapes as you traverse the desert terrain toward the mountains.

visit the national parks of death valley to see the hottest desert environment in the united states.
afterward, travel 150 miles to the major cities of barstow and needles for a night of stargazing.

head east to the national parks of bristoli valley to see ancient redwood groves and serene lakes.
the drive to the major cities of san francisco and oakland completes your circular journey with 200 miles of road.

enjoy the final leg of your trip by visiting the national parks of monterey bay to see sea lions and kelp forests.
conclude your adventure in the major cities of san francisco where you can reflect on your incredible west coast journey.

this itinerary ensures you see the best of the national parks and major cities along the way.
every stop offers breathtaking landscapes that will leave you in awe of nature's grandeur.

plan your meals and rest stops carefully to maximize your time in each unique location.
your enthusiasm for travel will be matched only by the beauty of the places you will visit.

remember to pack light and bring your camera to capture every moment of this epic road trip.
the combination of national parks and major cities creates an unforgettable experience for any traveler.

Conflicts between Keyword Constraints an.new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "breathtaking" in the response.
Conflicts between Keyword Constraints an.org_constraint: Use the phrase "breathtaking landscapes" exactly three times throughout the itinerary.
